{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211211157EDE10F560EBA2CBE11F"}"},"total":2559},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7159959155883868967","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错，章节内容没有啰嗦重复的语句。江湖事江湖了！主人翁从无到有，一路坎坷艰难险阻，但仍然坚持不懈地去做自己应该做的事，欠佳的是人与人之间的情感、心理状态刻画得不够尽致！期望后续精彩演绎……加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1667058098,"group_id":"7078121214211787810","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"现今番茄蓄势待发，它日扶摇直上九万里！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N92Ensp8eK8z5LieYqqpTeR4e3MGtXHiYS5W58OlOQx6","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619584&x-signature=COIg0Cf24es9cyIKjPOtpxTq078%3D","user_id":"1741227136140094","user_name":"心在荡漾88680"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1741227136140094","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1728495145,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7078121214211787810","book_info":{"abstract":"丈母娘：孟公子愿意出一百万彩礼，恐怕你一辈子都赚不到！
老丈人：你个穷货给不了我女儿想要的生活！
老婆：对不起，孟公子能给的你给不起，我们离婚吧！
然而，离婚后走出民政局那一刻。
倾城女总裁，一局之长，武馆馆主，甜美小白兔，玄门第一绝色……七个绝色大美女纷纷送上贺礼。
滨海别墅，劳斯莱斯幻影，唐朝瓷器，西郊土地，百亿礼金，
“师兄，恭喜你终于离婚了。”
“从现在开始，你……是我们的人了！！！”
